tasks.program:
package main
import "fmt"
func main() {
	var x uint8 = 0xA5
	x = x<<3 | x>>5
	x ^= 0x3C
	x = x + 0x9B
	x = ^x
	fmt.Println(int(x))
}

package main
import "fmt"
func main() {
	var a int32 = -1
	a = a << 31
	var b int32 = ^a
	fmt.Printf("%d,%d\n", a, b)
}

package main
import "fmt"
func main() {
	x := uint32(0xF0F0AA55)
	x = (x & 0x00FF00FF) ^ ((x >> 8) & 0x0000FFFF) ^ 0x0000002A
	fmt.Println(int(x & 0xFF))
}

package main
import "fmt"
func main() {
	x := 1
	x = x << (2 + 3)
	x = (x & 0x3FF) << 1
	x = (x << 3) << 0
	fmt.Println(x)
}

package main
import "fmt"
func main() {
	var x uint16 = 0xFFF0
	x += 0x0020
	x ^= 0x0005
	x = (x << 4) | (x >> 12)
	fmt.Println(int(x))
}
